DELETE /v1/media/.description: Deletes multiple media files in a single request.

PATCH /v1/media/change-document-status.description: Updates the status of a document (e.g., draft, approved, archived).

POST /v1/media/check-required-folders.description: Ensures required folder structure exists for a deal's media storage. Creates missing folders.

POST /v1/media/convert-webp-to-png.description: Converts a WebP image to PNG format for compatibility with systems that don't support WebP.

POST /v1/media/create-folder.description: Creates a new folder in the media storage hierarchy for organizing files.

POST /v1/media/moving.description: Moves one or more media files to a different folder.

POST /v1/media/remove-folder.description: Deletes a media folder and optionally moves its contents to another folder.

PATCH /v1/media/rename.description: Renames a media file or folder.

POST /v1/media/share-document.description: Generates a shareable link for a document or sends it to specified recipients.

PATCH /v1/media/upload-document-as-data.description: Uploads a document with structured metadata attached for processing and indexing.

POST /v1/media/upload-media.description: Uploads a photo, video, or document file. Supports image optimization and thumbnail generation.

GET /v1/meetings/.description: Returns all scheduled meetings with optional filtering by date, participant, or status.

GET /v1/meetings/available-calendars.description: Returns calendars that have available time slots for booking meetings.

POST /v1/migrations/rma-statuses.description: Internal migration — updates RMA records to use the latest status taxonomy. Admin only.

POST /v1/notifications/send.description: Sends a notification to one or more users via their preferred channel (push, SMS, email, or in-app).

GET /v1/notifications/upsert-novu-subscr.description: Syncs platform users to Novu notification service as subscribers for push and in-app notifications.

POST /v1/notifications/wu-reminder.description: Sends a reminder notification to contractors who haven't submitted their weekly renovation progress update.

GET /v1/onsite-visit/.description: Returns all onsite visits with optional filtering by deal, date range, status, or assignee.

POST /v1/onsite-visit/mobile-geolocation.description: Records the GPS location of a mobile user during an onsite visit for verification and tracking.

PATCH /v1/onsite-visit/{onSiteVisitId}.description: Updates fields on an onsite visit — date, status, notes, or assigned team member.

DELETE /v1/onsite-visit/{onSiteVisitId}.description: Cancels and deletes a scheduled onsite visit.

POST /v1/onsite-visit/{sessionId}/commen.description: Adds a comment to an onsite visit session. Comments are visible to all participants.

DELETE /v1/onsite-visit/{sessionId}/comm.description: Deletes a comment from an onsite visit session.

GET /v1/onsite-visit/{sessionId}/comment.description: Returns all comments for an onsite visit session in chronological order.

POST /v1/onsite-visit/{sessionId}/image-.description: Adds an annotated photo note to an onsite visit — captures a photo with markup and text notes.

PATCH /v1/onsite-visit/{sessionId}/image.description: Updates the text or annotations on an existing image note.

DELETE /v1/onsite-visit/{sessionId}/imag.description: Deletes an image note from an onsite visit session.

POST /v1/partners/realtycom.description: Handles incoming referral data from the Realty.com partner integration.

POST /v1/project-scopes/.description: Creates a new project scope for a deal with initial line items.

DELETE /v1/project-scopes/.description: Removes scope items from a project. Supports filtering by source type for selective removal.

POST /v1/property/{id}/recalculate.description: Recalculates a property report with updated comparables, timeline, or renovation parameters.
